chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1732 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 6802/25 2.For orders on office objections 3.For orders on CMA 6803/25 4.For hearing of main case 14-10-2025 Mr. Pervaiz Ali Maitlo, Advocate for petitioner. **** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition and submits that he will file petition afresh after curing some defects. Order accordingly. This petition is accordingly disposed of along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
